# PHImageContentMode

**Enumeration**

Options for fitting an image’s aspect ratio to a requested size, used by the [doc://com.apple.photokit/documentation/Photos/PHImageManager/requestImage(for:targetSize:contentMode:options:resultHandler:)] method.

## Declaration

```swift
enum PHImageContentMode
```

## Overview

With either option, the resulting image may not exactly match the target size, depending on the [doc://com.apple.photokit/documentation/Photos/PHImageRequestOptions/deliveryMode] and [doc://com.apple.photokit/documentation/Photos/PHImageRequestOptions/resizeMode] properties of the image request. To serve your request more quickly, Photos may provide a slightly larger image—one that it can generate more easily or one that is already cached.

## Constants

- **default**: Fits the image to the requested size using the default option, [doc://com.apple.photokit/documentation/Photos/PHImageContentMode/aspectFit].
- **PHImageContentMode.aspectFit**: Scales the image so that its larger dimension fits the target size.
- **PHImageContentMode.aspectFill**: Scales the image so that it completely fills the target size.

## Initializers

- **init(rawValue:)**

## Constants

- **Image Result Info Keys**: Keys identifying information about an image loading result, used in the `resultHandler` block with image request methods.

## Conforms To

- BitwiseCopyable
- Equatable
- Hashable
- RawRepresentable
- Sendable
- SendableMetatype
